Verified against explicit task instructions in setup_task.sh and verifier logic
Verified via setup_task.sh which copies the sample data to this path and verifier.py which evaluates this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires tagging the single deepest and longest dives in a real Subsurface logbook with specific tags. Independent analysis of the SampleDivesV2.ssrf file confirms that the objectively deepest dive has a max depth of 46.48m (Dive Number 90), while the objectively longest dive has a duration of 119:55 (Dive Number 348). The logbook is located at /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf. The correct tags to apply are exactly Record-Deep and Record-Long respectively.
